_comment: R0 SEED modality capability ledger per ADR-2605312700 §2.F + G10. This is the HONESTY REGISTRY: each entry binds a sensing modality to its declared evidenceGrade + regulatoryClass + an explicit canDetect / cannotDetect map. G10 STRUCTURAL: a modalityId not present here with a defensible evidence grade may NOT emit a modalityObservation. Grade-X entries are recorded ONLY to document explicit EXCLUSION (pseudoscience) — they may never emit. ALL entries ship verificationStatus=unverified-seed: evidence grade + regulatory class + phase gate MUST be human/Council-verified (councilAttestationCid) before any R1+ emission. evidenceGrade/regulatoryClass below are best-effort references as of 2026-05-31 and are jurisdiction-dependent (esp. regulatory class) — treat as scaffolds, not authoritative. R0..R2 may use ONLY phaseGate∈{R1,R2} + regulatoryClass=non-regulated-wellness + ionizing=false (G4 + G9). honest framing: the strongest cause-finding modalities (elastography / rhinometry / IgE / CRP) are exactly the regulated ones, R3-gated — see ADR Consequences.

modalities.provenance: markerless photogrammetry / depth-camera posture assessment literature
modalities.notes: 腰痛/肩こり の FUNCTIONAL (姿勢) 兆候に有効。構造原因は見えない。所見≠原因 (G7).

modalities.provenance: infrared thermography screening literature; regulators (e.g. US FDA) explicitly warn against thermography as a STANDALONE diagnostic
modalities.notes: 肩こり 血流 / 局所炎症 表面 の補助のみ。単独診断は不可 (規制当局も警告) → grade C, 兆候参考扱い (G7).
浮腫/体組成 の粗い推定。

modalities.provenance: shear-wave elastography is an ultrasound mode → regulated medical device; requires qualified operator
modalities.notes: 肩こり の筋硬度を数値化できる最良の modality だが ULTRASOUND = 規制医療機器 → R3 gated (G4). 硬さ≠つらさ (G7).

modalities.provenance: acoustic rhinometry ENT literature; medical device
modalities.notes: 鼻詰まり の 構造 を非電離で計測。原因(アレルギー/感染)は不明 → mitate/iyashi へ triage.
鼻詰まり の 気流/抵抗 を計測。

modalities.provenance: breath-analysis (e-nose / GC-MS) emerging research; not yet routine clinical
modalities.notes: 炎症 の非侵襲 biomarker 候補だが emerging。

modalities.provenance: specific-IgE in-vitro diagnostic; cross-ref iyashi phlebotomyAttestation (ADR-2605281950) + mitate diagnosticOrder
modalities.notes: アレルギー は IMAGING では不可 — 生化学のみ (N3). microsampling = IVD 規制 + 採血手技 → R3 gated; iyashi/mitate の採血経路と整合。
全身炎症 は血液のみ — 局所は thermography, 全身は CRP-class (検討の結論).

canDetect: (at a licensed facility) internal soft-tissue / bone structure, deep inflammation edema
cannotDetect: (in a kizashi pod) — NOT performed in-pod; referral only
modalities.provenance: ALARA / G9 — strong-field MRI + ionizing CT are referral-to-licensed-facility, NEVER routine pod scans
modalities.notes: G9 ALARA: 構造の確定は licensed facility での MRI/CT 紹介。kizashi pod では実施しない (CT は電離; MRI は強磁場規制)。エントリは『紹介先』を明示するために存在。

cannotDetect: anything — no validated physical mechanism or evidence base
modalities.provenance: G10 + N8 — recorded ONLY to document exclusion; bio-resonance has no scientific basis and may NEVER emit a modalityObservation
modalities.notes: 疑似科学。明示的に除外 (発火不可).

modalities.displayName: Aura / GDV / Kirlian 'energy field' imaging — EXCLUDED
cannotDetect: anything — measures skin moisture / corona discharge artifacts, not health
modalities.provenance: G10 + N8 — recorded ONLY to document exclusion
modalities.notes: 疑似科学。明示的に除外。

modalities.displayName: 'Quantum resonance' / 全身波動 analyzer — EXCLUDED
cannotDetect: anything — 'quantum magnetic resonance analyzer' / 波動 devices have no validated mechanism
modalities.provenance: G10 + N8 — recorded ONLY to document exclusion
modalities.notes: 疑似科学。明示的に除外。
